## Pre-Flight Checklist

- [ ] Read `docs/core/POCKETA_BRAIN.md`
- [ ] Read `docs/core/ARCHITECTURE_RULES.md`
- [ ] Changes reference an existing spec or a new spec is included
- [ ] `dart analyze` — no issues
- [ ] `flutter test` — all tests pass
- [ ] No new packages added without discussion
- [ ] No architecture decisions made unilaterally
- [ ] Files stay under 300 lines
- [ ] No raw hex colors — only `AppColors`
- [ ] `mounted` guard on all post-async UI calls

## Docs Updated

- [ ] `docs/tracking/TASKS.md`
- [ ] `docs/tracking/CURRENT_SPRINT.md`
- [ ] `docs/tracking/DECISION_LOG.md` (if architectural decision made)
- [ ] `docs/tracking/LESSONS.md` (if mistake or discovery worth noting)
- [ ] `docs/tracking/PROJECT_STATE.md` (if module state changed)
